query_title: The Misadventures of Hedi and Cokeman

recommendations.title: Keanu
recommendations.overview: Friends hatch a plot to retrieve a stolen cat by posing as drug dealers for a street gang.

recommendations.title: Outlaw
recommendations.overview: At the age of nine, Rebeca is sold by her grandmother to the bookseller who ran Rocinha. Disputed by bicheiros and drug dealers, the community is going through changes in power. Rebeca becomes the wife of the chief drug dealer and, with the death of

recommendations.title: Lord, Give Me Patience
recommendations.overview: An ultraconservative family father must spend a weekend with his dysfunctional children for the burial of his wife.

recommendations.title: Deuces Wild
recommendations.overview: In 1950s New York City, a bad and bloody gang war is about to erupt on the dysfunctional streets of Brooklyn between the Deuces and the vicious Vipers.

recommendations.title: Heli
recommendations.overview: Heli must try and protect his young family when his 12-year-old sister inadvertently involves them in the brutal drug world. He must battle against the drug cartel that have been angered as well as the corrupt police force.

recommendations.title: Coffy
recommendations.overview: After her younger sister gets involved in drugs and is severely injured by contaminated heroin, a nurse sets out on a mission of vengeance and vigilante justice, killing drug dealers, pimps, and mobsters who cross her path.

recommendations.title: Elite Squad
recommendations.overview: In 1997, before the visit of the pope to Rio de Janeiro, Captain Nascimento from BOPE (Special Police Operations Battalion) is assigned to eliminate the risks of the drug dealers in a dangerous slum nearby where the pope intends to be lodged.

recommendations.title: The People We Hate at the Wedding
recommendations.overview: A dysfunctional family that can't seem to get along and get it together reluctantly reunites for a family wedding. As their many skeletons are wrenched from the closet, it turns out to be just what this singular family needs to reconnect.

recommendations.title: Creed II
recommendations.overview: Between personal obligations and training for his next big fight against an opponent with ties to his family's past, Adonis Creed is up against the challenge of his life.

recommendations.title: How to Make Money Selling Drugs
recommendations.overview: Ten easy steps show you how to make money from drugs, featuring a series of interviews with drug dealers, prison employees, and lobbyists arguing for tougher drug laws.
